    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AuthService
    Service class responsible for user authentication operations
    Budget
    This class represents a budget for a specific category.
    BudgetRepository
    This class responsible for managing budget data.
    BudgetService
    Service class responsible for budget operations
    Goal
    This class represents a financial goal to be achieved.
    GoalRepository
    Repository class for Goal entities.
    GoalService
    Service class responsible for goal operations and business logic
    MainFrame
    Main graphical user interface for the Personal Budgeting Software.
    ReportService
    Service class responsible for generating financial reports.
    Transaction
    Represents a financial transaction in the system.
    Transaction.Type
     
    TransactionRepository
    Repository class for Transaction entities.
    TransactionService
    Service class responsible for transactions operations and business logic
    User
    This class represents a user with name, email, password, and balance.
    UserRepository
    Repository class for User entities.
